name: Sauerbraten Ala Brigitte
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the meat thoroughly. Place it in a porcelain or glass bowl. Slice the onions and carrots and place them on top of the meat. Add the bayleaf, peppercorns, wine, and buttermilk to the bowl. Let the meat marinate for 3 days, turning it over daily.
2. Cut the bacon into cubes and fry until crisp in the butter. Add the meat and brown it lightly on all sides. Stir in 2 tablespoons of the marinade and simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
3. Add the tomato paste, crumbled rye bread, and salt to taste. Add the carrot and onion slices, then simmer on low heat for about 1 1/2 hours, stirring occasionally and adding water as needed. Strain the gravy if desired and thicken with a little cornstarch for added consistency.
Traditionally served with wide noodles or mashed potatoes and carrots; try out more marinade to adjust to your taste.
Source: Brigitte Sealing, Cyberealm BBS, Watertown, NY
Typed for you by Linda Fields, Sysop, Cyberealm BBS, Watertown, NY 1993
